lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The car is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with minimal wear. The interior is clean and shows standard signs of use. The engine and mechanical systems are in reliable working order.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is clean with some light wear on the driver's seat. All mechanical and electrical components are functioning as expected.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still holds a strong luster, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and some light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, showing only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound, providing a smooth ride with all electronic features and climate control systems functioning as intended. It is a reliable, solid choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with respect.

Roll up your sleeves and get ready for a rewarding project! This car is the perfect choice for a mechanic or hobbyist looking for a budget-friendly challenge. While it needs significant mechanical attention and shows its age with plenty of wear and tear, it offers a great foundation for someone with the right skills to bring it back to life!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though there are a few minor rock chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper from daily driving. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the leather seats. Mechanically, the car is sound with no known issues, and all maintenance is up to date, including a recent oil change and tire rotation. A dependable choice for anyone looking for a well-kept car at a fair price.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen in truly pristine condition. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, presenting in showroom-quality state both mechanically and aesthetically. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! Looking for a total dream car? This beauty is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life and is ready for a new home. You won’t find a single scratch or dent on it. Come take a look and see for yourself, you're going to absolutely love it! 🚗✨

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 inline-six, a masterpiece of atmospheric engineering utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double-VANOS variable valve timing to achieve a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis is structurally immaculate, with proactive subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings to maintain factory-spec torsional rigidity. Power is managed via a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal mechanical grip. Meticulously maintained with documented valve adjustments and rod bearing service, the engine's compression and leak-down numbers remain within factory tolerances. The exterior showcases original paint depth and clarity, while the undercarriage remains free of oxidation, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a vehicle that truly defines 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with an open checkbook policy. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats remain supple with no bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the navigation and safety sensors, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively performed by certified technicians using genuine OEM parts. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of fair-weather driving only, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key masterpiece that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the assembly line.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, offered in truly impeccable condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class. The exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains pristine, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies even the most exacting collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a pre-owned masterpiece that mirrors the quality of a new acquisition.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, maintained in impeccable condition and representing the pinnacle of its class. This specimen features a flawless exterior finish paired with a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity that stands as a definitive testament to automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like a dream. You won't find a single scratch on it. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E92 M3 is a museum-grade example of the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 era. Featuring a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock, the powertrain offers an uncompromising 8,400 RPM redline with razor-sharp throttle response via individual throttle bodies. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for optimized suspension geometry and damping rates. Meticulously serviced with preventative rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator upgrades, this vehicle exhibits factory-spec compression and leak-down figures. The exterior maintains its original paint depth, and the forged alloy wheels remain free of any structural or cosmetic imperfections, reflecting its concours-level preservation.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Low mileage. Professional detail complete.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that represents the pinnacle of automotive care. This car is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and shielded from the elements since its first mile. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, swirl marks, or door dings, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in fresh, high-performance rubber. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, creasing, or staining. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a full service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by authorized specialists. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives with the same precision and smoothness as the day it was delivered. Includes two sets of keys, all original manuals, and a clean title.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains a flawless, showroom-grade luster, while the interior remains in pristine, original condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its factory-original state. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly impeccable specimen.

We are pleased to offer this superlative example of automotive engineering, presented in impeccable condition. This vehicle has been curated for the most demanding clientele, featuring an unblemished exterior and an interior that remains in showroom state. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a flagship model, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to verify its structural and operational integrity. This is a rare acquisition opportunity for those seeking a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty to believe it—it’s in absolute mint condition! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it basically still has that new-car feel. It drives like an absolute dream and looks stunning inside and out. I’m really going to miss it, but I know the next owner is going to be so happy behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six powerplant. This specimen exhibits exceptional mechanical health with a meticulously maintained VANOS system and recent rod bearing prophylaxis. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission provides crisp engagement, transferring power through a variable M-differential with zero lash. The chassis is structurally pristine, having received proactive subframe reinforcement to ensure torsional rigidity. Every suspension component remains within factory tolerances, preserving the communicative steering rack and balanced weight distribution this platform is heralded for. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, showing no signs of oxidation or clear coat failure, while the interior leather retains its original matte finish and bolster integrity. A
Pristine condition. One owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included.

Presenting a vehicle in truly impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior maintains a mirror-like factory finish, completely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats are firm with no bolster wear, and the dashboard remains pristine under climate-controlled storage. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced driver-assistance suite, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service binder. Driven only in dry conditions and kept in a heated garage, this one-owner gem represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. It offers the rare opportunity to own a modern classic that feels as though it just left the dealership floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this unit offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle retains its original showroom luster, featuring a pristine interior and a mechanically flawless profile. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this unit represents a premier acquisition in an increasingly rare condition.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly in pristine, showroom condition. I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless, so it looks and drives exactly like it did when it first rolled off the lot. It’s a total dream to drive and truly feels brand new. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of the S54 platform. This specimen features a meticulously maintained 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with a fully serviced dual-VANOS system and documented rod bearing replacement. The drivetrain utilizes a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission paired with a factory variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis has received a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and remains true to original geometry, supported by a refreshed suspension utilizing OEM bushings and Bilstein dampers. The exterior finish retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or panel misalignment, while the interior features pristine Nappa leather with negligible bolster wear. An absolute turn-key enthusiast piece with no mechanical compromises.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' specimen. Presented in a breathtaking, factory-original finish that has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, the exterior is absolutely devoid of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its meticulous, accident-free history as a single-owner, garage-kept treasure. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero bolster wear and retains its original scent, while the dashboard and trim pieces are free of any UV fading or scratches. We are pleased to offer this impeccably preserved specimen, representing the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and care. Every aspect of this vehicle, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine cabin environment, reflects a standard of excellence synonymous with showroom quality. Mechanically superior and aesthetically unblemished, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.
